summary: The SkillOS mission/JSM direction has advanced, but this Flywheel parent should not remain in_progress or close while the SkillOS loop-health apply path is still blocked.
did: Confirmed SkillOS has substantial mission-v2/JSM surfaces in its repo, including daily JSM sync observability and mission-v2 migration tooling.
Confirmed Flywheel's dependent apply owner flywheel-hg2w is still blocked by current loop-health evidence.
Moved this bead out of stale in_progress state so robot triage does not keep assigning it as active work.
did_not: Did not edit SkillOS repo files from Flywheel.
Did not claim SkillOS mission/JSM work is complete while loop-integrity remains non-green.
blocked_on: flywheel-hg2w or SkillOS-side equivalent must make callback receipt and pane/non-pane activity semantics current, then rerun loop-integrity-signals and gap-hunt-probe doctor.
